_: Seed dictionary of well-known PoE2 passive nodes (keystones, notables, ascendancy keystones). Schema: {id, name, kind, description, ascendancy?}. PoE2 is in Early Access — node IDs and effects shift between patches. Run download-passive-nodes.ps1 to regenerate from the live tree.

nodes.name: Resolute Technique
nodes.description: Your Attack Hits can't be Evaded. Your Attacks can't be Critical Strikes.

nodes.name: Mind Over Matter
nodes.description: 30% of Damage taken from Mana before Life.

nodes.name: Eldritch Battery
nodes.description: Energy Shield protects Mana instead of Life. 50% less Energy Shield Recharge Rate.

nodes.name: Acrobatics
nodes.description: Removed/replaced in PoE2 — verify current league.

nodes.name: Iron Reflexes
nodes.description: Converts all Evasion Rating to Armour. Dexterity provides no bonus to Evasion Rating.

nodes.name: Avatar of Fire
nodes.description: 50% of Physical, Cold and Lightning Damage from Hits Converted to Fire Damage. Deal no Non-Fire Damage from Hits.

nodes.name: Magebane
nodes.description: Gains 1% to maximum chance to Suppress Spell Damage per 14 Dexterity. Cannot Block Spell Damage.

nodes.name: Ancestral Bond
nodes.description: Can have up to 1 additional Totem Summoned at a time. You can't deal Damage with your Skills yourself.

nodes.name: Iron Will
nodes.description: Strength's Damage bonus applies to Spell Damage as well as Attack Damage.

nodes.name: Iron Grip
nodes.description: The increase to Physical Damage from Strength applies to Projectile Attacks as well as Melee Attacks.

nodes.name: Pain Attunement
nodes.description: 30% more Spell Damage when on Low Life.

nodes.name: Wind Dancer
nodes.description: 30% chance to Avoid being Stunned. 30% increased Evasion Rating if you haven't been Hit Recently.

nodes.name: Heart of Oak
nodes.description: Druid keystone — Treant form bonuses.

nodes.name: Lone Spirit
nodes.description: If you have no Allies nearby, gain Onslaught and 30% increased Damage.

nodes.name: Vital Force
nodes.description: Your Life Regeneration also applies to Energy Shield. 50% less Life Regeneration Rate.

nodes.name: Charge Infusion
nodes.description: Druid Shaman ascendancy node — bonus from active charges.

nodes.name: Wolf's Howl
nodes.description: Druid Shaman ascendancy node — wolf companion mechanics.

nodes.name: Ferocious Roar
nodes.description: Druid Shaman ascendancy node — Ferocious Roar interactions.

nodes.name: Bear Form Mastery
nodes.description: Druid Shaman ascendancy node — bear form bonuses.

nodes.name: Stormcaller
nodes.description: Druid Shaman ascendancy node — lightning attunement.

nodes.name: Druidic Prowess
nodes.description: Increased effect of Rage. Bonuses to shapeshift forms.

nodes.name: Heart of the Warrior
nodes.description: +30 to maximum Life. 8% increased maximum Life.

nodes.name: Trinity
nodes.description: Convert excess elemental damage; key to multi-element scaling.

nodes.name: Pounce Mastery
nodes.description: Bonuses to Pounce skill effect and damage.

nodes.name: Jewel Socket
nodes.description: An expansion socket where a jewel can be placed.
